languages.text: "Я представлял{mf||а} вас иначе. В вас так много от челяди и так мало от человека, наделенного властью".

traits.locale_text: "Я представлял{mf||а} вас иначе. В вас так много от челяди и так мало от человека, наделенного властью".

languages.text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."
languages.original_text: "Я представлял{mf||а} вас иначе. В вас так много от челяди и так мало от человека, наделенного властью".

traits.locale_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."
"I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."
"I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

languages.text: “你和我想象的不太一样。你身上仆从之气太盛，而掌权者之威太弱。”
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: “你和我想象的不太一样。你身上仆从之气太盛，而掌权者之威太弱。”

languages.text: « Je ne vous imaginais pas ainsi. Moi qui vous voyais comme une figure d'autorité, je m'aperçois que vous n'êtes qu'un exécutant servile. »
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vous imaginais pas ainsi. Moi qui vous voyais comme une figure d'autorité, je m'aperçois que vous n'êtes qu'un exécutant servile. »

languages.text: "Seni farklı hayal etmiştim. Otoriter bir adam değil de bir köle gibisin."
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: "Seni farklı hayal etmiştim. Otoriter bir adam değil de bir köle gibisin."

languages.text: «Le imaginaba distinto. Veo mucho al sirviente y muy poco al dirigente».
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: «Le imaginaba distinto. Veo mucho al sirviente y muy poco al dirigente».

languages.text: "Ich hatte mir Euch anders vorgestellt. In Euch steckt so viel Unterwürfigkeit und so wenig Autorität."
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte mir Euch anders vorgestellt. In Euch steckt so viel Unterwürfigkeit und so wenig Autorität."

languages.text: 「私は君を違った姿で想像していた。君には奉仕する男の面影が強く、権力を持つ男の面影はほとんどない。」
languages.original_text: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."

traits.locale_text: 「私は君を違った姿で想像していた。君には奉仕する男の面影が強く、権力を持つ男の面影はほとんどない。」
